Name: Sun Glare
Description: Post-processing lens artifact effect that simulates starburst-style glare patterns produced when a bright light source interacts with camera aperture blades or optical diffraction, creating radial streaks and chromatic highlights.

Fields.Name: Is Sun Glare Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables or disables star-shaped glare generation around bright light sources in the scene.

Fields.Name: Alpha
Fields.Description: Overall opacity of the sun glare effect, controlling the visibility of radial streaks and bloom intensity.

Fields.Name: Number of Lines
Fields.Description: Defines the number of radial streaks emitted from the light source, simulating aperture blade diffraction patterns.

Fields.Name: Number of Passes
Fields.Description: Number of rendering passes used to accumulate and refine the glare effect for smoother or more intense starburst results.

Fields.Name: Length
Fields.Description: Controls the length of radial glare streaks extending from the light source, affecting overall starburst scale.

Fields.Name: Attenuation
Fields.Description: Controls how quickly glare intensity fades along the streak length, simulating light falloff in optical diffraction.

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Rotational offset of the starburst pattern, determining the orientation of radial glare streaks around the light source.

Fields.Name: Chromatic Aberration
Fields.Description: Controls the amount of color separation along glare streaks, simulating lens-induced chromatic dispersion effects.

Fields.Name: Color Coefficient
Fields.Description: Overall color scaling factor for the glare effect, adjusting intensity and tint of the starburst highlights.
